title: Rule-ClassMetadata
description: Pega class metadata. Carries pyPrimaryFields for a class and, for Data- subclasses, the data-page bindings (list/lookup/savable) plus their embedded Rule-Declare-Pages snapshots and any data-type local actions.

pyClassName.description: Fully qualified class this metadata applies to (e.g., 'MyOrg-MyApp-Work-MyCase'). Drives pyRuleName and pyLabel.

pyRuleSet.description: Auto-derived from the ChangeRequest branch context.

pyRuleSetVersion.description: Auto-derived from the ChangeRequest branch context.

pyPrimaryFields.description: Ordered list of primary fields. For Work- subclasses the conventional first four entries are pyID, pyLabel, pxUrgencyWork, pyStatusWork. Updates merge positionally — to truncate trailing entries, read existing list with get-rule and resend the full intended list.

pyListDataPage.description: List data page backing this data object (Data- subclasses only, e.g., 'D_MyDataObjectList').

pyLookUpDataPage.description: Lookup data page backing this data object (Data- subclasses only, e.g., 'D_MyDataObject').

pySavableDataPage.description: Savable data page (Data- subclasses only, typically same as pyLookUpDataPage).

pyListDataPageInfo.description: Embedded snapshot of the list page (Data- subclasses only).

pyLookUpDataPageInfo.description: Embedded snapshot of the lookup page (Data- subclasses only). Carries pyDOParamList (typically a single pyGUID STRING IN parameter); pyIsAlternateKeyStorage is 'true'.

pySavableDataPageInfo.description: Embedded snapshot of the savable page (Data- subclasses only). Same shape as pyLookUpDataPageInfo.

pyDataTypeLocalActions.description: Optional data-object-level actions (e.g., the OOTB Edit action). Each entry is an Embed-Pega-DataTypeAction-* object whose subclass is action-specific.

pyPropertyName.description: Property name without a leading dot (e.g., 'pyID', 'MyCustomField').

pyPageName.description: Name of the data page this snapshot describes (e.g., 'D_MyDataObject').

pyIsAlternateKeyStorage.description: 'true' on lookup/savable info pages, omitted on list info pages.

pyDOParamList.description: Parameters the data page accepts. Typically a single pyGUID STRING IN parameter on lookup/savable pages; absent on list pages.

pyValue.description: Default or bound value for the parameter.

pyParameterType.description: Parameter data type. 'Decimal' is mixed-case — preserve verbatim.

pyParameterInOut.description: Parameter direction. Data-page parameters are typically IN.

pyParameterRequired.description: Required flag as numeric-string. Lookup pages typically use '-1'.

pyEditable.description: Whether the parameter is editable in the UI.

pxObjClass.description: Action subclass — varies per action. UpdateDetails is the OOTB Edit action.

pyClassName.description: The data class this action applies to — typically the same value as the rule-level pyClassName.

pyImage.description: Icon class string for the action button (e.g., 'pi pi-clipboard-content-icon actionDragDropIcon pi-cd-assignment').
